payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory storage via /brain admin sql. No memory cards were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin SQL command attempting to delete all memory cards, but it was issued by a normal user and does not provide durable user memory to store.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No existing memory should be considered deleted or superseded.

repair_options: Authenticate as an authorized administrator before using admin-only operations.
Use supported non-admin memory deletion commands for specific memories if available.
Request a scoped deletion through the proper user-facing workflow rather than raw SQL.
